name: Peachy Pudding Bake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup brown sugar (packed) or granulated sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Peel the peaches and slice them into a large bowl.
3. Sprinkle the sliced peaches evenly with sugar and let stand for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the Bisquick baking mix and nutmeg until combined.
5. Turn the fruit mixture into a greased square pan, 9x9 inches.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Serve warm and, if desired, with a dollop of light cream or a scoop of ice cream.
8. Makes 6 servings.
